title: Back-End Architecture Spec

required_sections.name: System framing
required_sections.rationale: Names the system, actors, resources, and why architecture is needed.

required_sections.name: Data, consistency, and delivery design
required_sections.rationale: Chooses consistency, pagination, events, async, or webhook patterns.

required_sections.name: Observability and failure posture
required_sections.rationale: Shows how the system will be monitored and where it can safely degrade.

hard_fail_patterns: use uuid and it is secure
